#Comments on cifuzz.yml:

Minor question - does the on statement in line 2 need brackets? on: [pull_request]


The yaml spec version 1.2 was spot checked and observed to have a "flow sequence" which is written as a comma separated list within square brackets. It was like a JSON array. Maybe a sequence or array with one value is fine.

Github documentation (reference 1) had examples for a single event and multiple events. The example skipped brackets for single sequence:
	Using a single event
		on: push
	Using multiple events
		on: [push, fork]


Reference(s):
-1.
	Workflow syntax for GitHub Actions
	go-to subsection for 'on'
	https://docs.github.com/en/actions/reference/workflows-and-actions/workflow-syntax#on
